prioritySupport.originalTextSummary: I am extremely upset. The new mobile payment option keeps crashing. I tried to transfer funds to my dad, but the transaction failed. My card number is ****-****-****-4444 and my email is t***r@g***.com. Please resolve this immediately!
prioritySupport.redactedText: I am extremely upset. The new mobile payment option keeps crashing. I tried to transfer funds to my dad, but the transaction failed. My card number is [REDACTED] and my email is [REDACTED]. Please resolve this immediately!

marketing.originalTextSummary: Your auto-invest feature is absolutely amazing! It has made saving so easy for me. I accidentally put my SSN ***-**-6789 in the support form earlier because I got confused, but your representative was incredibly helpful and fast. Love this app!
marketing.redactedText: Your auto-invest feature is absolutely amazing! It has made saving so easy for me. I accidentally put my SSN [REDACTED] in the support form earlier because I got confused, but your representative was incredibly helpful and fast. Love this app!

generalArchive.originalTextSummary: Could you add dark mode support to the main analytics page? The bright theme is a bit hard on the eyes at night.
generalArchive.redactedText: Could you add dark mode support to the main analytics page? The bright theme is a bit hard on the eyes at night.

generalArchive.originalTextSummary: Hello, I am a patient checking if member ID AB******CD is valid for this portal. You can contact me back on my home phone (***) ***-2045 during business hours. Thank you.
generalArchive.redactedText: Hello, I am a patient checking if member ID [REDACTED] is valid for this portal. You can contact me back on my home phone [REDACTED] during business hours. Thank you.
